items.title: PinsDB
items.text: A running record of every frame my friends and I have bowled -- who's winning, who's streaking, and who owes who a beer.

items.title: At a Glance
items.text: Metric Value Games logged 956 Sessions 91 Bowlers tracked 9 Total pins knocked down 87,958 Date range Jul 23, 2024 – Jul 05, 2026

items.title: Fun Awards
items.text:
🌵 Wombat King🕳️ Gutter Champ🔥 On Fire

Lucas has the most wombats on record, with 29 career wombats.

Lucas has thrown the most gutter frames, with 32 and counting. A dubious honor.

Lucas is riding a 3-game win streak heading into the next session.

items.title: Fun Facts
items.text:
Biggest Blowout

Ryley won by 133 points on March 25, 2025 -- the largest margin of victory in a single game on record.

Busiest Session

August 06, 2024 saw 24 games bowled in a single day -- the most of any session so far.

Perfect Game Watch

Nobody's bowled a 300 yet. The all-time high is 231, set by Lucas.

Want the full picture? Check out Statistics for strikes, spares, and scoring trends, or browse every Result game by game.

Last updated July 16, 2026.
